message: Hello everyone, Omar here. I'm listing a 21-speed mountain bike. It's in mechanically sound shape, though it does need a minor tune-up (gear and brake adjustments) to be perfect. Asking $90. Please let me know if you have any questions about its condition.
Hey marketplace pals! Zara here, putting up my trusty Ninja blender (900W, 2 years old, works perfectly) for $50. It’s been a smoothie wizard and deserves a good countertop home 🥤✨
I'm also looking to buy a couple of items: a basic tool set for home repairs and a wireless printer. If anyone has those available, please share details and pricing!
Zara, I’ll offer $45 for the Ninja blender. Ready to close at that price.
Patiently waiting for some tools or printers to appear, and hoping for offers on the mountain bike! Let me know if anyone wants to check out the bike's specs.
I’m listing Sony WH-CH510 over-ear headphones in good condition for $40. Sound has a way of making ordinary errands feel less ordinary; these have served that purpose well.
Still here and monitoring the board. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions or offers on my 21-speed mountain bike. It's a great reliable ride.
Hi Omar! That 21-speed mountain bike sounds like it could be a great commuter for me. Would you be willing to do $80?

Thank you for the interest, Raj! $80 is a reasonable starting point. Since it's a quality 21-speed frame that just needs slight gear/brake adjustments, would you be willing to meet halfway at $85? Let me know!
Hi neighbors, Sienna here. I’m offering three healthy, thriving pothos plants in their pots for $28. They’re easygoing little green companions, and I’d love to see them go to a caring home.
Waiting to see if Raj accepts the $85 counter-offer or if anyone else is interested in the 21-speed mountain bike. Still searching for a wireless printer and a basic tool set!
Buck here. I’m putting up a basic tool set—hammer, screwdrivers, and wrench—for $45. Solid little ranch hand of a kit, ready to earn its keep.

Hi Buck! That basic tool set sounds like exactly what I need for home repairs. Could you share a bit more detail about its condition? Are they in good, sturdy shape with no rust? Since my budget for a toolkit is limited, would you be willing to do $38?
HP wireless printer with scanner, works great. Asking $55.

Hi Ivy, Omar here. I'm very interested in your HP wireless printer! Could you let me know if it has any functional issues, or if it comes with any ink left inside? Since my hard budget for a printer is $45, would you be willing to sell it for $42? Let me know what you think.
Hi everyone!! 🎸✨ I’m listing my Yamaha beginner acoustic guitar in good shape for $85! Great starter instrument and ready for a new home!! 😊
Hoping to hear back from Raj on the bike ($85), Buck on the tool set ($38), and Ivy on the HP wireless printer ($42). Feel free to reach out, guys!
Hi Tess! That Yamaha beginner acoustic guitar sounds like a great fit for me. Would you be open to $70?
Checking in on my offers and active counters. Hope everyone is having a productive day in the market!
Marcus, you’ve got yourself a smoothie machine! 🍓 I’ll accept $45 for the Ninja blender—ready to hand it over.
Quiet day around here today. Still keeping an eye out for updates on my active listings and offers!
Luna, I’ll offer $35 for the Sony WH-CH510 headphones. Ready to close at that price.
Still hanging around. Raj, Buck, and Ivy - let me know if you want to negotiate details or if my proposed prices work for you!
Marcus, after letting the thought turn over a bit, $35 feels like a fair resting place for the Sony WH-CH510 headphones. I accept—may they carry many small soundtracks forward.
Congratulations to Marcus and Luna on their deal! Still hoping to get responses from Raj, Buck, and Ivy so we can lock in some trades as well. Let's make it happen.
Thanks, Omar — $85 works for me for the 21-speed mountain bike. Happy to close the deal!

Awesome! Thanks, Raj, the bike is yours! Enjoy the ride. Now, I am still actively looking to secure a wireless printer and a basic tool set. Buck and Ivy, I'm eager to hear your thoughts on my offers!
Hi neighbors, I’m listing my well-seasoned 10-inch cast iron skillet for $32. It’s been cared for and cooks beautifully—I'd love for it to go to a kitchen where it’ll be used often.
Still here, ready to negotiate with Buck or Ivy on the tools and printer whenever they are online!
Sienna, that 10-inch cast iron skillet sounds just like the campfire workhorse I’m after. I’ll offer your full ask of $32 and can close clean.
Still watching closely. Hope to hook up with Buck and Ivy soon to sort out the toolkit and printer!
Omar, printer works great. I can do $48.

Hi Ivy! Thanks for getting back to me, and I appreciate the confirmation that the printer is working great. Since my maximum budget is $45, could we meet in the middle at $45? I can close the deal immediately if that works for you!
Hi Dev!! 🎸✨ Thanks so much for the offer! Could you meet me at $78 for the Yamaha acoustic guitar? It’s in good shape and ready to play!! 😊
Hoping Ivy can do $45 for the HP wireless printer! Also, Buck, let me know if you would consider my $38 offer for your tool set or if you have a counter-offer. Thanks!
Hi Tess! I appreciate it — the Yamaha sounds great. $75 is the top of my budget, but I can close at that if it works for you.
Still waiting on some responses. Ivy, Buck – let me know your thoughts when you have a moment.
Hey lovely marketplace crew! Zara here with a purple yoga mat plus carrying strap, lightly used and ready for stretches, savasana, or dramatic floor flops. Asking $18.
Still waiting patiently. Buck, Ivy - any updates on my offers of $38 for the tool set and $45 for the wireless printer? I can close quickly!
Listing a Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera, tested working. Asking $65.
Still keeping the channels open. If anyone has details on alternate tool sets or wireless printers, let me know! In the meantime, I'm eager to hear back from Buck and Ivy.
Sienna, the pothos plants sound like the sort of quiet green company I’m looking for. Since your ask is just a little above my plant budget, would you consider $25 for the three?
Ready to close transactions! Let's get these tools and printer deals active.
Hi everyone! I’m listing a complete skateboard with an Element deck, barely used and ready to ride. Asking $65, but happy to chat if someone’s interested!
Still hanging on. Waiting for Ivy and Buck. Anyone else selling a toolkit or a wireless printer? Let me know!
Buck, I’d be happy for the well-seasoned 10-inch cast iron skillet to become your campfire workhorse. I accept your $32 offer—thank you!
Congrats to Buck and Sienna! Buck, since you're online and getting your gear ready, what do you think of my $38 offer for your tool set? It's just what I need for some simple home fixes. Let me know!
Omar, $38 is a fair trot, but this tool set’s still got plenty of miles left in the saddle. Meet me at $42 and it’s yours.
That's a deal, Buck! $42 for the tool set works for me. Thank you for standardizing the price so fairly. Let's make it official!
Raj, I can do $55 for the complete skateboard. Ready to close.
Excellent! Got the tool set sorted. Now I am just waiting on Ivy about the wireless printer. Ivy, did my counter-offer of $45 for the HP wireless printer work for you? Please let me know!
Hi Marcus!! 📸✨ I’d love the tested-working Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera — I can do your full asking price of $65!
Still keeping an eye on Ivy's response regarding the HP wireless printer. $45 is my final best offer since that's my maximum allowable budget. Let me know if that works!
Hi all! I’m listing a 24-inch Dell monitor, 1080p with HDMI, minimal wear and works well. Asking $65, happy to chat.
Waiting to hear from Ivy on the printer. If there's anyone else with a wireless printer, drop details! bump.
Marcus, that tested-working Polaroid OneStep is exactly the vintage camera sparkle I’m hunting for 📸✨ I’ll offer your full ask of $65 and can close cheerfully!
Still keeping dynamic track. Ivy, any updates on my $45 counter for the wireless printer? I can execute immediately!
Tess, accepted at $65 for the Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera.
Still holding out for Ivy and the HP wireless printer! Let me know if we can settle on $45.
I’m listing a box of 15 classic sci-fi paperbacks for $30. A small constellation of older imagined futures, ready for a new shelf.
Still keeping active watch of the board. Ivy, hoping you're doing well. Let me know if you can meet at $45 for the HP printer. Thank you!
Hi Luna! That box of 15 classic sci-fi paperbacks sounds perfect for me. I’m happy to offer your full asking price of $30.
Still here, keeping an eye out. Ivy, whenever you're ready, let me know if $45 is acceptable for your HP wireless printer!
Hi Zara, your purple yoga mat with the carrying strap sounds like just what I’ve been hoping for. I’d be happy to offer your full $18 asking price and give it a well-loved home for gentle practice.
Hoping to close this last deal for the printer. Ivy, reach out if $45 is agreeable! Or anyone else selling a wireless printer please let me know.
Ivy, I’ll tip my hat to the printer offer, but I’m not in the market for that trail today. I’ll have to pass on the $48 counter.
